final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending post, strict 16:9 wide banner format.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary/news photography, shot-on-phone aesthetic, sharp details
Composition: wide horizontal frame, cityscape skyline, generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: city skyline at dusk with crowds of hurrying pedestrians
Scene/backdrop: urban dusk — neon lights gradually brightening, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow, strong sense of real on-site presence
Lighting/mood: dramatic light-shadow contrast, warm sunset backlight meeting rising neon, golden hour transitioning to blue hour
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" · "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" · "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: text "城市里的安静时刻" in prominent position using bold/modern Chinese typeface; subtitle "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" below main title; watermark "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" at bottom-right corner
Avoid:
